headline: EPAM Systems Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: EPAM tops Q1 estimates as revenues climb 7.6%, driven by Financial Services and Software & Hi-Tech growth despite macro uncertainty.

headline: EPAM (NYSE:EPAM) Posts Q1 CY2026 Sales In Line With Estimates
summary: Digital engineering services company EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.6% year on year to $1.4 billion. On the other hand, next quarter’s revenue guidance of $1.41 billion was less impressive, coming in 1.1% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.86 per share was 3.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

Its non-GAAP profit of $2.86 per share was 3.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: EPAM Systems raises annual profit forecast on strong IT service demand
summary: EPAM Systems on Thursday raised its annual profit forecast, after beating quarterly profit ‌estimates, on strong demand for its software services ‌amid sustained spending by companies on artificial intelligence technology enhancement. The ​IT consultancy firm expects full-year adjusted profit to be in the range of $12.98 to $13.28 per share, compared with the prior view of $12.60 to $12.90. It forecast second-quarter profit in the ‌range of $3.10 to $3.18 ⁠per share on an adjusted basis, the mid-point of which is above the estimates of $3.10.

headline: EPAM Systems (NYSE:EPAM) Q1 Results: EPS Beat Overshadowed by Revenue Miss
summary: EPAM Systems Q1 2026 earnings beat EPS estimates at $2.86 but missed revenue forecasts, posting $1.400B. Shares fell ~1.84% pre-market on revenue concerns despite strong profitability.

headline: EPAM shares slip despite quarterly earnings beat and upbeat guidance
